metadata.description: Claude Code plugin (ECC) — agents, skills, hooks, rules, commands, MCP configs, and install runtime spanning JavaScript hook scripts, Python LLM provider module, and a Rust session daemon (ecc2).
metadata.approach: Hybrid 3-layer: full Service→Module→File hierarchy for both code and docs; selective Function/Class nodes only for core entrypoints in the JS install runtime, Python LLM CLI, and Rust ecc2 binary.

nodes.label: Plugin Installation Workflow
nodes.description: User runs install.sh or `ecc install` to plan and apply an install profile (minimal/core/developer/security/full) into a target harness (Claude home, Cursor project, Codex home, Gemini, OpenCode, Qwen, etc.). Modules expand into components which deposit files at target paths.

nodes.label: Tool-Use Hook Lifecycle
nodes.description: Claude Code emits tool events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop, SessionStart, SessionEnd, PreCompact) which fan out through plugin-hook-bootstrap and dispatcher scripts (pre-bash-dispatcher, post-bash-dispatcher) into focused hook handlers, all gated by run-with-flags using ECC_HOOK_PROFILE.

nodes.label: TDD Workflow
nodes.description: User invokes /tdd; the tdd-workflow skill, tdd-guide agent, and post-edit-typecheck/post-edit-format hooks coordinate red-green-refactor cycles enforced by quality-gate and stop-format-typecheck hooks.

nodes.label: Code Review Workflow
nodes.description: User invokes /code-review; the code-reviewer agent (plus language-specific reviewers such as cpp-reviewer, csharp-reviewer, django-reviewer) consults rules/code-review.md and language rules to produce a structured review.

nodes.label: Feature Development Workflow
nodes.description: User invokes /feature-dev or /plan; the architect/code-architect/code-explorer agents collaborate with the feature-development skill to draft a plan, then implementation is driven by tdd-workflow and verified by code-review.

nodes.label: Session Management Workflow
nodes.description: session-start, session-end, session-activity-tracker hooks plus the Rust ecc2 daemon and Node sessions-cli persist conversation state, store metrics, and surface them via statusline and operator-readiness dashboards.

nodes.label: Cross-Harness Adaptation
nodes.description: Install targets in scripts/lib/install-targets translate canonical ECC components into harness-specific layouts (.claude, .cursor, .codex, .gemini, .opencode, .qwen, .codebuddy, .kiro, .trae). harness-adapter-compliance and gemini-adapt-agents normalize content per harness.

nodes.label: CI Validation Workflow
nodes.description: GitHub Actions run scripts/ci/validate-* (agents, commands, hooks, skills, rules, install-manifests, workflow-security, no-personal-paths, unicode-safety) plus scan-supply-chain-iocs to gate PRs.

nodes.label: Skill Discovery & Invocation
nodes.description: Skills under skills/ (~230) and .claude/skills are surfaced to Claude via the Skill tool; some are gated by hookify-rules / skill-comply; outputs of /skill-create flow through scripts/skill-create-output.js.

nodes.label: LLM Provider Selection
nodes.description: User runs `python -m llm`; cli/selector lists providers (Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, AstraFlow), the resolver instantiates one, prompt/builder applies templates, tools/executor runs tool calls.

nodes.label: Plugin Manifest & Marketplace
nodes.description: .claude-plugin/plugin.json and marketplace.json describe the plugin to Claude Code; the schema lives in schemas/plugin.schema.json.

nodes.label: Install Profiles, Modules, Components
nodes.description: Profiles (minimal/core/developer/security/full) compose Modules which expand to Components — declared in manifests/ and validated against schemas/install-*.schema.json.

nodes.label: Harness Adapter
nodes.description: An abstraction that maps canonical ECC artifacts (agents/skills/commands/hooks/rules) onto the on-disk layout each agentic harness expects (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Qwen, CodeBuddy, Kiro, Trae, Antigravity, JoyCode).

nodes.label: Agent
nodes.description: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter (name, description, tools, model) representing a delegatable subagent (architect, code-reviewer, tdd-guide, …).

nodes.label: Skill
nodes.description: Reusable workflow/domain knowledge unit with When-to-Use / How-It-Works / Examples sections, invoked via the Skill tool.

nodes.label: Slash Command
nodes.description: User-invoked command (/tdd, /plan, /e2e, /code-review, …) implemented as a markdown prompt with a description frontmatter line.

nodes.label: Hook
nodes.description: JSON-declared automation triggered by Claude Code tool events; runs Node scripts (and one Python wrapper) gated by run-with-flags / ECC_HOOK_PROFILE / ECC_DISABLED_HOOKS.

nodes.label: Rule
nodes.description: Always-follow guideline file under rules/ — split into common cross-cutting rules and per-language rule packs.

nodes.label: MCP Server Configuration
nodes.description: Declarative MCP server wiring (.mcp.json, mcp-configs/mcp-servers.json) merged per-harness via scripts/codex/merge-mcp-config.js and scripts/lib/mcp-config.js.

nodes.label: Session State & Observability
nodes.description: Per-conversation state (activity, costs, tool usage) captured by Node hooks and the Rust ecc2 daemon, exposed via ecc-statusline, operator-readiness-dashboard, and observability-readiness reports.

nodes.label: Prompt-Defense & Supply-Chain Baseline
nodes.description: Repeating Prompt Defense Baseline included in CLAUDE.md and rule files, plus scripts/ci/scan-supply-chain-iocs.js, security-review skill, gateguard-fact-force hook, and SECURITY.md.

nodes.label: Quality Gate
nodes.description: Pre-commit / pre-push / post-edit checks: commit-quality, no-verify block, console.log warn, format, typecheck — coordinated by quality-gate.js and stop-format-typecheck.js.

nodes.label: LLM Provider Abstraction
nodes.description: Pluggable LLM backend interface (src/llm/core/interface.py) with provider implementations for Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, AstraFlow and a runtime resolver.

nodes.label: Test-Driven Development
nodes.description: Red-green-refactor discipline encoded in the tdd-workflow skill, tdd-guide agent, language-specific *-tdd skills, and verified by post-edit hooks.

nodes.label: Test & Validation Harness
nodes.description: Repository test suite (tests/run-all.js) covering JS hooks/lib/scripts, plus Python tests for the llm module and CI validators for agents/commands/skills/hooks/rules/manifests.

nodes.label: Plugin Manifest Service
nodes.description: Plugin and marketplace manifests consumed by Claude Code to register ECC.

nodes.label: Agents Service
nodes.description: Catalog of ~60 markdown agent definitions (canonical) plus .agents/ for harness-specific variants.

nodes.label: Skills Service
nodes.description: ~230 skill directories grouped by domain (engineering, security, design, ops, language-specific).

nodes.label: Commands Service
nodes.description: Slash command markdown files plus legacy-command-shims/commands forwarding deprecated names.

nodes.label: Hooks Configuration
nodes.description: hooks.json declaring all PreToolUse/PostToolUse/SessionStart/Stop/PreCompact wiring and the memory-persistence subdirectory.

nodes.label: Scripts Runtime
nodes.description: Node runtime — hook handlers (scripts/hooks), helper libraries (scripts/lib), install pipeline, CI validators, codex/codex-git-hooks adapters, codemaps utilities.

nodes.label: Rules Service
nodes.description: Common rules plus per-language rule packs (python, typescript, golang, rust, java, kotlin, swift, php, ruby, …).

nodes.label: MCP Config Service
nodes.description: MCP server definitions (mcp-servers.json) plus root .mcp.json.

nodes.label: Install Manifests Service
nodes.description: Profile / module / component manifests consumed by the install pipeline.

nodes.label: Schemas Service
nodes.description: JSON Schemas for plugin, hooks, install manifests/state, package-manager, provenance.

nodes.label: Python LLM Module
nodes.description: Provider-agnostic LLM CLI with core interface, multiple provider adapters, tool executor, and prompt builder.

nodes.label: ecc2 Rust Daemon
nodes.description: Rust binary providing session daemon, worktree orchestration, TUI dashboard, notifications, observability.

nodes.label: Documentation
nodes.description: Architecture, business, examples, fixes, releases, security docs plus localized README variants and several long-form guides at the repo root (README.md, the-longform-guide.md, the-shortform-guide.md, the-security-guide.md, WORKING-CONTEXT.md).

nodes.label: Test Suite
nodes.description: Mixed JS (tests/lib, tests/hooks, tests/scripts, tests/integration, tests/docs, tests/commands, tests/ci) and Python (test_*.py) tests with run-all.js orchestrator and conftest.py.

nodes.label: Harness Layout Mirrors
nodes.description: Per-harness directories holding harness-native equivalents of agents/skills/commands/hooks/rules, produced by install-targets.

nodes.label: scripts/hooks
nodes.description: Hook handler scripts (pre/post bash dispatchers, edit/write hooks, session hooks, quality-gate, observer-runner, gateguard, doc-file-warning, run-with-flags wrapper).

nodes.label: scripts/lib
nodes.description: Shared libraries: utils, package-manager, install-executor/lifecycle/manifests/state, install-targets, session-manager, hook-flags, mcp-config, shell helpers, state-store.

nodes.label: scripts/ci
nodes.description: CI validators (agents/commands/hooks/skills/rules/install-manifests/workflow-security/no-personal-paths/unicode-safety) and supply-chain IOC scanner.

nodes.label: scripts/codex
nodes.description: Codex-specific merge utilities for codex config and MCP config.

nodes.label: scripts/lib/install-targets
nodes.description: Harness-specific install target implementations (claude-home, cursor-project, codex-home, gemini-project, opencode-home, qwen-home, codebuddy-project, antigravity-project, joycode-project) plus registry and helpers.

nodes.description: Provider interface and shared types.

nodes.description: Concrete LLM providers (claude, openai, ollama, astraflow) plus resolver.

nodes.label: src/llm/prompt
nodes.description: Prompt builder and template assets.

nodes.description: Ratatui-style dashboard app and widgets.

nodes.label: ecc2/src/{comms,config,notifications,observability,worktree}
nodes.description: Cross-cutting ecc2 modules.

nodes.description: Common rule files: agents, code-review, coding-style, development-workflow, git-workflow, hooks, patterns, performance, security, testing.

nodes.label: rules (language packs)
